scripts.preflight:env: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('.env.shared')&&fs.existsSync('env.shared.example')){fs.copyFileSync('env.shared.example','.env.shared');console.log('✅ Created .env.shared from env.shared.example');}if(!fs.existsSync('.env')&&fs.existsSync('deployment/docker/env.example')){fs.copyFileSync('deployment/docker/env.example','.env');console.log('✅ Created .env from deployment/docker/env.example');}"
scripts.infra:start:core: docker-compose -f deployment/docker/docker-compose.yml -f deployment/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --force-recreate postgres redis rabbitmq loki promtail grafana clickhouse
scripts.setup:dev: pnpm preflight:env && pnpm install && pnpm build:packages && pnpm infra:start:core && pnpm infra:wait-db && pnpm infra:create-dbs && pnpm migrate:run && pnpm dev:minimal
scripts.infra:create-dbs: node -e "const{execSync:c}=require('child_process');try{c('docker exec service-postgres-dev psql -U postgres -c \"CREATE DATABASE gateway_db;\"');console.log('✅ Created gateway_db')}catch(e){if(e.stderr&&e.stderr.includes('already exists')){console.log('ℹ️  gateway_db already exists')}else{console.log('ℹ️  gateway_db: '+e.message)}}"
scripts.infra:wait-db: node -e "const net=require('net');let attempts=0;function tryConnect(){attempts++;const s=net.createConnection({host:'localhost',port:5432},()=>{console.log('✅ PostgreSQL is ready');s.end();process.exit(0)});s.on('error',()=>{s.destroy();if(attempts>=30){console.error('❌ PostgreSQL not ready after 30 attempts');process.exit(1)}console.log('⏳ Waiting for PostgreSQL... ('+attempts+'/30)');setTimeout(tryConnect,2000)});s.setTimeout(3000,()=>{s.destroy();if(attempts>=30){console.error('❌ PostgreSQL not ready after 30 attempts');process.exit(1)}console.log('⏳ Waiting for PostgreSQL... ('+attempts+'/30)');setTimeout(tryConnect,2000)})}tryConnect();"
scripts.start:dev:local: pnpm preflight:env && pnpm infra:start && pnpm infra:wait-db && pnpm dev
scripts.start:prod: pnpm infra:prod:start && pnpm build && pnpm start
